name: Void Invasion
desc:
You can send up to 2 cards from your hand to the GY; Set that many "Void" Spell/Trap from your Deck.
During the Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; place 1 "Void" Continuous Spell face-up in your Spell/Trap Zone.
You can only use each effect of "Void Invasion" once per turn.
